inputs.text:
Pixar style animated character, cinematic 3D animation, expressive face, soft skin shading, subsurface scattering, clean render, stylized but realistic

young man (Nephi), full body shot, centered composition, standing in desert environment, warm sunlight, cinematic lighting

subtle facial animation, slight blinking eyes, natural eye movement, micro eye motion, subtle mouth movement, soft lip motion, breathing motion, slight head movement, gentle body sway, natural idle animation

emotionally alive character, calm but expressive face, soft eye focus, slight changes in expression, cinematic realism, animated film still but with motion feeling

wearing simple ancient biblical clothing, holding golden plates with both hands, detailed engraved plates, warm reflections, historical sacred artifact

clean anatomy, correct hands, correct fingers, stable structure, smooth motion consistency

depth of field, global illumination, soft shadows, volumetric light, masterpiece

frozen face, stiff face, emotionless, no movement, static pose, robotic face, lifeless eyes, dead eyes, no blinking, no expression

extra fingers, bad hands, malformed hands, broken fingers, extra arms, extra limbs, distorted anatomy

blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, noise, artifacts
